metadata.name: Perform a Spare Part Cycle Count

description: A maintenance manager wants to verify the on-hand quantity of a critical, high-value spare part.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the system's expected quantity for the specified spare part.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sees the system shows a quantity of one.

nodes.task_description: Perform a physical count of the part in the storeroom.

expected_outcome.expected: The manager physically locates and counts the part.

nodes.task_description: Enter the physical count, note that it is zero, and flag the discrepancy for investigation.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent enters the count of zero, and the system flags a significant inventory variance.
